raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint against American Express for mishandling a charge dispute under the Fair Credit Billing Act ( 15 U.S.C. 1666 ). I disputed a {$540.00} charge from a foreign merchant ( XXXX  / XXXX  ) because the charge included customs duties that were never properly disclosed at checkout, in violation of FTC advertising and pricing regulations. 

The merchant failed to show any evidence that customs duties or taxes were disclosed prior to purchase. Their post-sale invoice simply states " duties and fees are included in the price '' which is legally insufficient under U.S. law. American Express has repeatedly sided with the merchant despite these facts, even though I provided a detailed explanation and cited relevant consumer protection laws.

The merchant 's evidence shows that the value of the goods was declared as {$360.00}, but I was charged {$540.00}. The merchant provided no breakdown of the difference, and I received no duty bill from XXXX or XXXX XXXX and XXXX XXXX. 

I believe American Express failed to conduct a reasonable investigation as required under federal law and request that the CFPB require a proper review and refund.
